user_a: when are formal performance reviews administered
user_b: when are formal performance reviews administered
output_b_raw:
Formal performance reviews at Bramblewick & Sons are conducted twice annually:

1. **Mid-Year Review (Around July):** This occurs midway through the year to assess progress, adjust goals, and identify development needs.

2. **Annual Review (Around January):** This happens at the end of the year to evaluate full-year performance, set new goals, and plan for growth.

These structured sessions foster continuous monitoring and adjustment of objectives, ensuring alignment with company goals and individual growth trajectories.

FINAL ANSWER: Formal performance reviews are administered twice a year: once around July for the mid-year review and again around January for the annual review.
